recommended_action: If rows are zero, repair source-cue extraction before choosing note style.
Regenerate the endnote prototype if the PDF artifact is missing or empty.
Repair marker syntax if note IDs do not survive text extraction.
Repair note text if source IDs disappear during rendering.
Keep notes at the back until a final endnote/footnote design pass chooses page placement.
Compress repeated source clusters before final layout if full-book notes feel too dense.
